title: Center of Excellence LDRA
content: Center of Excellence LDRA LDRA has setup Center of Excellence focusing on Enforcing Standards Driven Software Development under LDRA Academic Alliance Program at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Himachal Pradesh. For more than forty years, LDRA has developed and driven the market for software that automates code analysis and software testing for safety-, mission-, security-, and business-critical markets. Working with clients to achieve early error identification and full compliance with industry standards, LDRA traces requirements through static and dynamic analysis to unit testing and verification for a wide variety of hardware and software platforms. Boasting a worldwide presence, LDRA is headquartered in the United Kingdom with subsidiaries in the United States, India and Germany coupled with an extensive distributor network. As a part of Center of Excellence, Students at JUIT taught the use of LDRA software in multiple programming labs to develop codes which are standard driven and as per the industry standards. LDRA bridges the gap of academic teaching and industry requirements in writing secure and reliable code.
